creator: mx5arbc@hotmail.com
text:
Here is a copy of LOG after adding the parameters to loader.conf (no change to behaviour - still cannot see hard drive when SCSI connected)

VM is running on W10PRO-64 Creators' update HYPERV,

PC IS using Core i7-4770, 16 GB RAM, O/S Virtual disk on SAMSUNG 950PRO SSD

VM has 2 virtual cpu's, 5 GB dedicated RAM, 1 virtual disk for O/S, 1 Seagate 1 TB disk defined as SCSI.  LOG is below:
